news.title: Tesla rolls out robotaxi service in Miami
news.summary: Tesla said on Friday its robotaxi was available in Miami, ‌as the electric vehicle maker looks ‌to expand its autonomous ride-hailing operations.  The expansion highlights ​Tesla's efforts to increase adoption of its self-driving software, a version of which it uses in the robotaxis and a key ‌part of CEO ⁠Elon Musk's shift from EVs to AI and robotics.  Tesla's move comes ​as the ​robotaxi sector gains ​momentum, with competitors ‌such as Alphabet's Waymo and Amazon's Zoox accelerating their expansion efforts.
